differential_diagnoses: AL amyloidosis (with cardiac and renal involvement)
Nephrotic syndrome due to Monoclonal Gammopathy of Renal Significance (MGRS)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Quantification of protein excretion with spot urine protein-to-creatinine ratio and 24-hour collection
Echocardiogram with global longitudinal strain imaging to evaluate for amyloid infiltration
Kidney biopsy with immunofluorescence and electron microscopy
Bone marrow biopsy and aspirate with flow cytometry and Congo red staining
Liver imaging/elastography or biopsy to characterize nodular liver contour
Cardiac MRI with gadolinium enhancement to look for characteristic amyloid patterns
